description: One not yet known who carries potential for connection. Stranger encompasses mystery and possibility, the guest at the door, future friend, and the understanding that every beloved was once a stranger.
rationale: The word 'nauke' flows from grounding 'na' through 'u' (creating vowel hiatus) to energizing 'ke'. Using only vowel hiatus, this three-syllable progression captures strangers as grounded presence opening into dynamic possibility.
